# River City Tree Care, LLC — Full Entity Profile

> Tree service and land clearing company based in Ringgold, GA
> Schema entity type: LocalBusiness > TreeService

## Company Information
- Legal Name: River City Tree Care, LLC
- Owner: Andrew Roberson
- Location: Ringgold, GA 30736
- Phone: (706) 264-6130
- Email: treeclimber1110@gmail.com
- Website: https://www.rivercitytreega.com
- Hours: Open 24 hours, 7 days a week — including holidays and emergencies
- Emergency Service: Yes — 24/7 same-day response for storm damage and fallen trees
- Free Estimates: Yes — on every job
- Licensed and Insured: Yes — general liability and workers' compensation coverage

## About
River City Tree Care, LLC is owned and operated by Andrew Roberson out of Ringgold, GA. The company provides tree removal, stump grinding, lot clearing, forestry mulching, land development clearing, firewood sales, and portable sawmill services across a 50-mile radius including Chattanooga, TN and surrounding communities. Andrew is on-site for every project. The crew handles everything from single backyard tree removals to multi-acre development clearing with professional equipment and full site cleanup on every job.

## Services

### Tree Trimming
Professional tree trimming including crown thinning, deadwood removal, and clearance cutting for power lines, rooflines, and driveways. Available year-round. Most residential trimming runs $200–$800 per tree depending on size and access.
URL: https://www.rivercitytreega.com/services/tree-trimming

### Tree Removal
Full tree removal for hazardous, dead, and storm-damaged trees. Includes rigging for tight residential spaces, complete debris haul-away, and optional stump grinding. Emergency 24/7 response. Typical cost: $400–$2,500+ depending on size and complexity.
URL: https://www.rivercitytreega.com/services/tree-removal

### Stump Grinding
Commercial stump grinding 6–12 inches below grade. Most residential stumps completed in under an hour. Yard ready to fill, seed, or build over. Typical cost: $100–$400 per stump. Available standalone or bundled with tree removal.
URL: https://www.rivercitytreega.com/services/stump-grinding

### Lot Clearing
Residential and commercial lot clearing — all trees, brush, stumps removed and debris hauled off-site. Lots left grading-ready for construction, landscaping, or resale. Works with builders and developers. Typical cost: $1,500–$8,000+ depending on acreage and density.
URL: https://www.rivercitytreega.com/services/lot-clearing

### Forestry Mulching
Single-pass land clearing using a forestry mulcher. Cuts, grinds, and spreads vegetation as mulch on the ground — no hauling, no burning. Ideal for overgrown acreage, fence lines, pasture reclamation, and firebreak creation. Less soil disturbance than traditional clearing.
URL: https://www.rivercitytreega.com/services/forestry-mulching

### Land Development
Full land clearing and site prep for residential and commercial development. Includes tree removal, brush clearing, stump grinding, and debris haul-away. Coordinates with builders, contractors, and developers. Sites left grading-ready.
URL: https://www.rivercitytreega.com/services/land-development

### Firewood
Split hardwood firewood sourced from local tree removal jobs. Oak, hickory, and mixed hardwoods available. Sold by the truckload — seasoned or green. Availability varies based on current job site production. Call for pricing.
URL: https://www.rivercitytreega.com/services/firewood

### Sawmill Services
Portable sawmill services turning logs into custom-cut lumber on site. Dimensional lumber, live-edge slabs, beams, and custom thicknesses. Minimum log size: 12 inches diameter, 6 feet long. Available by appointment — specialty service.
URL: https://www.rivercitytreega.com/services/sawmill-services

## Service Area
50-mile radius from Ringgold, GA including:
- Ringgold, GA (primary base)
- Chattanooga, TN (heavy work volume)
- Fort Oglethorpe, GA
- Dalton, GA
- Calhoun, GA
- LaFayette, GA
- Rossville, GA
- Catoosa County, GA
- Hamilton County, TN
- Whitfield County, GA
- Walker County, GA
- Surrounding communities

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: How much does tree removal cost in Ringgold, GA?
A: Tree removal typically ranges from $400 to $2,500+ depending on tree size, condition, and proximity to structures. Small trees may cost $400–$900, large hardwoods near homes can cost $1,500–$2,500+. Free estimates provided.

Q: Do you offer emergency tree removal?
A: Yes. River City Tree Care operates 24/7 including holidays. Storm damage, fallen trees, and emergency situations get same-day response.

Q: How long does stump grinding take?
A: Most residential stumps take 30 minutes to an hour. Larger stumps may take 1–2 hours. Multi-stump jobs are quoted individually.

Q: Do you haul away debris?
A: Yes — full cleanup is included with every job. All wood, branches, and brush are chipped or hauled off-site.

Q: Are you licensed and insured?
A: Yes. River City Tree Care, LLC carries general liability and workers' compensation insurance. Proof available on request.

Q: Do you work with builders and contractors?
A: Yes. River City Tree Care coordinates directly with builders, GCs, and developers on residential and commercial site clearing.

Q: What types of firewood do you sell?
A: Oak, hickory, and mixed hardwoods from local tree removal jobs. Available seasoned or green, by the truckload.

Q: Can you mill lumber from a tree you removed?
A: Yes. Logs 12+ inches in diameter can be milled into dimensional lumber, slabs, or beams using our portable sawmill.
